📘 Viewer Role

EDMS Viewer Manual

Browse documents, read files, and track approvals — all in one place.

📅 Updated: June 16, 2026
🏷️ v1.0
📄 12 sections
⏱ 8 min read
📸 Screenshots included
📋
Section 1

Introduction

Welcome to EDMS — the Electronic Document Management System. As a Viewer, you can browse, search, and read documents but cannot upload, approve, or manage them.

ScreenWhat You Can Do
DashboardView stats, project folders, recent documents, and activity feed
All DocumentsBrowse and search all documents. Open any document to view details.
Recently ViewedDocuments you opened in the last 30 days
Workflow TemplatesView active templates — read-only
Document DetailAll five tabs: Overview, Files, Version History, Status History, Retention
PDF ViewerOpen PDFs, view and write comments
NotificationsReceive and read system notifications
ProfileView your profile, roles, and permissions
⚠️ If you need upload, approval, or admin access, contact your administrator to update your role.
🔐
Section 2

Logging In

Login screen

2.1 Username & Password

  1. Enter your Username — your email address (e.g. you@vivant.com).
  2. Enter your Password. Click the eye icon to show or hide it.
  3. Press Enter or click Sign In.
⚠️ If your credentials are incorrect, a red error message appears below the password field.

2.2 Google Sign-In

Click Continue with Google, select your account, and you are redirected to the Dashboard automatically.

Logging Out

Click your avatar top-right > Logout.

🖥️
Section 3

Interface Overview

AreaDescription
Sidebar (left)Dashboard, Documents (All Documents, Recently Viewed), Workflows (Workflow Templates). Hamburger (≡) button collapses/expands it.
Header (top)"Search documents, files, content..." bar. Moon icon for dark/light mode. Notification bell. Profile avatar.
Main ContentDocuments, tables, and screens.
📊
Section 4

Dashboard

Viewer Dashboard

4.1 Stat Cards

  • Approved DocumentsTotal approved documents in the system
  • Documents ViewedTotal documents you have personally opened

4.2 Projects Grid

Colored folder cards showing project name, document count, and pending count (orange). Click any folder to filter All Documents.

4.3 Recent Documents

Last 8 updated documents. Columns: DOCUMENT, OWNER, TYPE, VERSION, STATUS, MODIFIED. Click View All for All Documents.

4.4 My Activity

"My Activity — Your recent document actions." Scrollable feed showing activity badges (e.g. logout, login, permission_denied), description, and timestamp.

📁
Section 5

All Documents

All Documents — Viewer view

5.1 Layout

  • Left sidebarProject folder tree. Reload (↺) refreshes.
  • Right toolbarAll Types filter, Sort dropdown, List/Grid toggle. No Upload button for Viewers.

5.2 Document List

Each row: file type icon, document title (bold) + code + colored project tag. Columns: DOCUMENT, OWNER, MODIFIED, VERSION, STATUS, TYPE, ACTIONS. Eye icon opens document.

5.3 Status Tabs

All, Approved, Pending, Resubmit, Rejected.

📄
Section 6

Document Detail

Click the eye icon on any document to open the Document Detail dialog.

6.1 Overview Tab

Overview tab

Fields: Project, Document Code, Version, Discipline, Created, Document Type, Last Modified, Created By, Status. Also: Description, AI Overview ('✦ AI Overview'), Approval Pipeline (when Pending), VIEWED BY section.

6.2 Files Tab

Files tab

Files tab — AI Summary expanded

  • ✦ AI Summary toggleExpands FILE SUMMARY scrollable panel. Icon becomes ^ when expanded.
  • View (eye icon)Opens PDF Viewer or DWG Viewer
  • DownloadOnly visible if document allows downloads
⚠️ Add File and Remove icons are not available to Viewers.

6.3 PDF Viewer

PDF Viewer with Comments panel

  • Left panelPDF with page badge. Collapse arrow (>) toggles comments.
  • HeaderTitle/code, live viewer count, fullscreen (⤢), search icon.
  • Comments panel"General Comments" + "Highlights" tabs. "Write a comment..." input + send. Highlight PDF text to comment on specific sections.

6.4 Version History Tab

Version History tab

Cards: version badge (solid blue=current, light=older), change summary in blue, date, uploaded by. Current has green "Current" badge.

6.5 Status History Tab

Status History tab

Cards newest-first: colored left bar, title (approver label or system message), "Changed to [Status]", "By [Name or System] · [DateTime]". Current has green "Current" badge.

6.6 Retention Tab

Retention tab

  • Assigned PolicyName + period
  • Effective FromWhen retention started
  • Retention End Date"Document expires on this date" — "Not started" if inactive
  • Secure Delete RequiredYes/No
  • Approval RequiredYes/No
🕐
Section 7

Recently Viewed

Recently Viewed screen

Subtitle: "Documents you opened in the last 30 days". Columns: DOCUMENT TITLE, DISCIPLINE, TYPE, VERSION, LAST VIEWED (date + time). End of list: "All N viewed documents loaded".

⚙️
Section 8

Workflow Templates

Workflow Templates — read-only

Shows all active templates. Read-only for Viewers — no Active toggle or edit icon.

  • Type iconIdentifies the template type
  • Name + badgeTemplate name with Sequential or Parallel badge
  • DescriptionBrief description
  • N StagesNumber of approval steps (top-right)
  • Step chipse.g. "1 Manager > 2 AVP"
⚠️ Only users with documents.manage or system.admin permission can create, edit, or deactivate templates.
🔔
Section 9

Notifications

Notifications panel

  • ✓✓ buttonMarks all notifications as read
  • ✕ buttonDismisses individual notification
  • Red dotUnread indicator

Types: Document Approved, Document Created, Share Link Approval Required. Each shows bold title, description, relative timestamp. Click to navigate.

👤
Section 10

Your Profile

User Profile dialog

Click avatar top-right > User Profile. Shows: avatar, full name, email, role badge, Active status, DISCIPLINE, LAST LOGIN, ROLES & PERMISSIONS (role chips + permission checklist).

Moon icon toggles dark/light mode. Logout ends your session.

🔧
Section 11

Troubleshooting

IssueWhat to Do
Cannot log inCheck username (email) and password. Caps Lock off. Contact administrator if needed.
Google sign-in errorAccount may not be linked or deactivated. Contact administrator.
Screen or button missingAs a Viewer, some screens are not accessible. Contact administrator to update your role.
Cannot download a fileDocument may not allow downloads. Contact document owner or administrator.
Cannot add or remove a fileViewers cannot modify files.
Document stuck on PendingCheck Approval Pipeline in Overview tab.
Not receiving notificationsCheck your account is active. Contact administrator.
PDF Viewer not loadingTry refreshing. Check internet connection or contact administrator.
📖
Section 12

Glossary

TermMeaning
Approval WorkflowA defined set of reviewers a document must pass through.
Document CodeUnique auto-generated code per document.
Document TypeClassification category (e.g. Drawing, Contract, Report).
DisciplineOrganizational department a document belongs to.
DWGAutoCAD drawing file format accepted alongside PDF.
Fence ViewShare link — view-only, download/print/copy disabled, time-limited.
PendingA document awaiting an approval decision.
Retention PolicyA rule defining how long a document must be kept.
Sequential WorkflowApprovers act one at a time in a defined order.
SLAService Level Agreement — deadline for approval.
StagesNumber of approval steps in a workflow template.
VersionA numbered revision of a document's attached files.
ViewerA user with documents.view permission only.
📋
Changelog

Changelog

v1.0 June 16, 2026 Initial Release

First version of the manual. Covers all screens verified against the live application with embedded screenshots.

Features included in this release:

  • ✅ Complete screen-by-screen documentation
  • ✅ Embedded verified screenshots
  • ✅ Role-specific content (Viewer / Admin)
  • ✅ Live search and sidebar navigation
  • ✅ PDF download
  • ✅ Previous / Next section navigation
  • ✅ "Was this helpful?" feedback
  • ✅ Multi-language support (English, Filipino, Bisaya)
  • ✅ Reading progress tracker
